summary: Average show with a notable Valley Road close but overall a letdown compared to the hot Berlin shows; recording quality not mentioned.
review: The performance includes some interesting moments—most notably a Valley Road finish to the first set—but after two stellar Berlin concerts it feels like a slight disappointment. Reviewers suggest other shows from this tour are stronger, and no comments were made about the audio quality of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; show is described as a letdown with only a few highlights, and no recording details are provided.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not address sound quality, clarity, or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set ends with Valley Road, but overall the concert is viewed as a step down after recent strong Berlin shows.
